source.sqlReaderQuery: select table_schema, table_name from information_schema.tables where table_schema = 'dbo'

sqlReaderQuery.value: select Order_Id, First_Name, Inserted_Date from dbo.orders where Inserted_Date > '@{activity('ADE_SourceLookup').output.firstRow.max_inserted_date}'

transformations.name: ADEselectedColumns
transformations.description: Renaming ADELeftJoin to ADEselectedColumns with columns 'id, name, email,o_id, cust_id, price'
